title: 愿光常在
scene: 石榴红与柔金的克制庆贺构图中，文案被当作真正的主视觉来处理，氛围温暖、细腻、有祝福感。
prompt: Design a premium vertical Chinese typographic wallpaper for category 文字 / 祝福. Luxurious but restrained celebratory poster with garnet background, one subtle lantern halo or ribbon arc, and large readable Simplified Chinese text: “愿你所行皆坦途 / 所遇皆温柔”. Tender, blessed, refined, with elegant negative space. No clutter, no watermark, no logo, no border.
author: OpenAI Codex
copy:
愿你所行皆坦途
所遇皆温柔
